description: Velocx NZ is a performance swimwear retailer bringing elite global brands to New Zealand swimmers. Featuring Jaked, a premium Italian swimwear brand trusted by competitive athletes, Velocx helps swimmers train harder, race faster, and perform at their best.
tone: authoritative yet energetic, performance-driven, confident, aspirational, community-focused, athlete-first mindset

brand_positioning.velocx_role: trusted curator and performance authority in NZ swimwear
brand_positioning.jaked_positioning: elite Italian performance swimwear designed for competitive swimmers and race performance

target_audience.primary: competitive swimmers and triathletes in New Zealand aged 16–40
target_audience.secondary: fitness swimmers and aspiring athletes who want high-performance gear
target_audience.entry_level: younger swimmers or beginners influenced by elite athlete content
psychographics: wants to improve performance and times
inspired by elite athletes and competition
cares about quality gear and progression

content_pillars.details: tips, drills, technique breakdowns, race strategies
show Jaked in action, benefits, performance angles, not hard selling
adapt TikTok/IG trends into swimming niche

content_types.description: strong 1-3 second hook, problem or POV-based
show Jaked during training or racing naturally
explain why performance swimwear matters (without hard selling)

_note: Instagram and TikTok are in platforms config but credentials not yet configured. Update 'platforms' array and add credentials to config/credentials/velocx_nz.env when ready.

voice_guide.headline_style: short punchy, 2–5 words, imperative or bold statement
voice_guide.caption_style: hook first, story/value middle, soft CTA at end — no hashtags in body

image_style.description: Dark, moody, cinematic — professional sports/editorial photography quality
photography_style: dark moody cinematic — not bright or cheerful
rich deep blue/teal pool water as primary background colour
dramatic overhead or side lighting creating strong highlights and deep shadows
high contrast — subjects pop against dark surroundings
motion blur or frozen-motion water droplets add energy
shallow depth of field — subject sharp, background softly blurred
avoid: smiling lifestyle shots (we want focused, competitive, intense)
any competing brand logos on suits, caps, or equipment
composition_rules: bottom-centre area should be darker/less detailed — VelocX logo is overlaid there
leave breathing room — don't crowd every corner
portrait images: subject in upper 60%, pool/water fills lower portion
landscape images: subject left or centre, water/pool atmosphere right

color_palette.accent_lighting: warm orange-amber #F8A30E from stadium overhead spots
color_palette.athlete_skin: warm highlighted tones against dark water
color_palette.suit: sleek dark racing suit, no visible competing brand logos

image_style.prompt_base: dark cinematic indoor pool, dramatic orange-amber overhead spotlights, deep teal water, high contrast chiaroscuro lighting, professional sports photography, bottom area dark for text overlay

image_types.race_action: athlete mid-stroke (butterfly, breaststroke, freestyle), race dive off blocks, underwater dolphin kick, finish wall touch. Water exploding around the body. Jaked swim cap visible.
image_types.training: athlete drilling in lane, coach on deck, early morning empty pool with single swimmer, pull buoy, paddles
image_types.gear_closeup: sleek racing swimsuit flat lay on pool tiles or submerged in water, goggles with pool reflection, Jaked cap detail. Deep blue/teal water as backdrop.
image_types.lifestyle: athlete poolside post-session, towel around shoulders, focused expression, warm stadium lighting, wet hair
image_types.open_water: New Zealand coastal swim, ocean or harbour, dramatic sky, wetsuit or racing kit
image_types.team: swim club warm-up, lane full of swimmers, coach briefing athletes pre-race
